query:
SELECT h.id,
                   h.feedback_id,
                   h.from_status,
                   h.to_status,
                   h.reason_note,
                   h.duplicate_of_feedback_id,
                   h.transitioned_by,
                   h.transitioned_at
            FROM feedback_status_history AS h
            JOIN feedback AS f ON f.id = h.feedback_id
            WHERE f.tenant_id = $1
              AND f.project_id = $2
              AND f.short_code = $3
            ORDER BY h.transitioned_at DESC
